subcodes.first_line: O Baqir! Hearken unto the shrill voice of the Most Exalted Pen from the direction of thy Lord, the Most High, the All-Glorious, that My melodies may attract thee and cause thee to soar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا باقر اسمع صریر قلم الاعلی عن شطر ربک العلی الابهی لتجذبک نغماتی و تطیرک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
